message:
fix(ui): prevent stale raw event replay and improve timeline timestamp handling

Refactor the TUI event loop to extract events once at the start of
update() and reuse throughout, preventing double-processing of stale
raw events. Removes peek_raw_event() in favor of the cleaner
single-extraction pattern.

Also adds ts_to_secs() helper for safe timestamp conversion and
improves timeline day-jump logic for millisecond-precision timestamps.

Adds tests: palette_interceptor_does_not_replay_stale_raw_event and
timeline_jump_finds_next_day_with_millisecond_timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
